name: solo_LTR_architecture
description: Solo LTR architecture record for S. cerevisiae. Solo delta/sigma/tau/omega LTRs are 251-371 bp tandem-repeat remnants of unequal homologous recombination between the two LTRs of a full-length Ty element. ~380 solo LTRs dot the genome in S288C, predominantly upstream of tRNA and other Pol III genes; solo LTRs outnumber full-length elements ~10:1.

architecture.internal_structure: single LTR (251-371 bp depending on Ty family) without intervening gag-pol; recombination remnant
